From Enrollment to Employed

Four steps. Self-paced. No campus required.

★ MedSim — Included with every program

Real Skills. Real Simulations.

Practice patient communication, vitals, wristband verification, phlebotomy, and post-op care — all before you step into a real clinical setting.

Post-Op Observation

Monitor vitals, review clinical actions, and build patient rapport post-surgery.

Phlebotomy Skills Lab

Practice wristband verification, lab requisition, and patient safety protocols.

Pediatric Asthma Check

Communicate with pediatric patients, take weight, and document findings accurately.

Pharmacy Simulation

Navigate live drive-thru pharmacy workflows, verify prescriptions, and manage patients.

Phlebotomy Skills Lab

Verify patient identity using wristband scanning before performing procedures.

Medical Billing

Practice coding, claims submission, and insurance workflows in a real billing environment.

Medical Coding

Apply ICD-10 and CPT codes to real patient cases and sharpen accuracy before the field.

EKG

Read and interpret live electrocardiogram rhythms and identify cardiac conditions in real time.

Multiple

Clinical scenarios

Patient

Live patient reactions
